settings.des_intro: Automatically earn discounts for your wax!
settings.content_intro:
Buy wax, earn rewards, easy as that! Join the movement and become a member of our rewards program. Tap the pink present on the right side to get started!

As a member, you will receive rewards every time you shop, scroll for more details on how to earn and redeem points:

settings.subtitle: Join
settings.description: Sign up to create your account

settings.subtitle: Earn
settings.description: Earn rewards through purchasing + more ways to earn below!

settings.subtitle: Save
settings.description: Redeem your points for exclusive discounts!

settings.section_title: Tap here to create an account

settings.subtitle: Create An Account
settings.description: Earn 2000 points for creating an account!

settings.subtitle: Leave a Review
settings.description: 250 reward points for an honest review.

settings.subtitle: Celebrate Your Birthday
settings.description: 500 points every year on your B-day!

settings.subtitle: Refer Another Wax Artist
settings.description:
They get 20% off their first purchase!
You get 1,000 points for referring a peer!

settings.sub_heading: Rack up your points and get to saving!

settings.subtitle: Follow Instagram
settings.description: 100 reward points; follow us on Instagram!

settings.subtitle: Follow Facebook
settings.description: 100 reward points; follow us on Facebook!

settings.subtitle: Follow Twitter
settings.description: 100 reward points; follow us on Twitter!

settings.subtitle: Facebook Share
settings.description: You will get 100 points on Facebook for sharing

settings.sub_heading: Boost your points with extra engagement:
Redeem your points for incredible rewards like exclusive discounts, free Bombshell products, and more 👀

settings.sub_title: After selecting your desired product through the Loyalty Rewards popup (tap the pink present on the right side of your screen!) and copying your discount code, select your desired item below and add the item to your cart. The item must say “Loyalty Reward” in the title to be eligible for the discount. At checkout, input your discount code and your product will be 100% discounted!

settings.block_description_question: No, offers do not combine/stack, only one discount may apply per order.
All refunds and returns will be on the discounted amount of the order.

settings.block_title_question: How do I redeem my free product(s)?
settings.block_description_question: Click the pink present on the right-hand side. After selecting your desired product through the tab called "Get Rewards", add the item to your cart (see above for free product collection). The item must say “Loyalty Reward” in the title to be eligible for the discount. At checkout, input your discount code and your product will be 100% discounted!

settings.block_title_question: How do I view my point balance?
settings.block_description_question: Click the pink present on the right-hand side and login. Your point balance will be displayed at the top of the pop up!

settings.section_title: Never miss our updates about new arrivals and special offers

settings.html_content:
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "mainEntity": [{
    "@type": "Question",
    "name": "Can I combine/stack discounts?",
    "acceptedAnswer": {
      "@type": "Answer",
      "text": "No, offers do not combine/stack, only one discount may apply per order."
    }
  },{
    "@type": "Question",
    "name": "Refunds and Returns?",
    "acceptedAnswer": {
      "@type": "Answer",
      "text": "All refunds and returns will be on the discounted amount of the order."
    }
  },{
    "@type": "Question",
    "name": "How do I redeem my free product(s)?",
    "acceptedAnswer": {
      "@type": "Answer",
      "text": "Click the pink present on the right-hand side. After selecting your desired product through the tab called \"Get Rewards\", add the item to your cart (see above for free product collection). The item must say “Loyalty Reward” in the title to be eligible for the discount. At checkout, input your discount code and your product will be 100% discounted!"
    }
  },{
    "@type": "Question",
    "name": "How do I view my point balance?Click the pink present on the right-hand side and login. Your point balance will be displayed at the top of the pop up!",
    "acceptedAnswer": {
      "@type": "Answer",
      "text": "Click the pink present on the right-hand side and login. Your point balance will be displayed at the top of the pop up!"
    }
  }]
}
</script>

settings.description_teams:
We are a female-founded, 100% woman-led team of collaborative dreamers who value innovation, curiosity and free-thinking fearlessness in everything that we do.
We take immeasurable pride in our work, intentionally stitching love into the very fiber and fabric of our designs. We are small, but we are a mighty group of talented individuals dedicated to bringing you otherworldly designs with imagery to match.

settings.content_newletter:
It only takes a second to be the first to find
out about our latest news

settings.btn_banner1: Have an account already?  What are you waiting for! Tap here to start shopping
settings.btn_banner2: Tap here to check out our blog for more news and exciting updates!

settings.block_content: A superior Beeswax blend, carefully sourced with ethical standards.
Adheres more to the hair and not the skin, leaving the skin feeling soft & supple and clients feeling confident & fresh.
Doing business together, we help animals, people, plants and our planet to thrive.
